# Sitewise

> Sitewise is the Construction Site Operating System for Indian contractors, supervisors, builders and accountants. It brings materials, labour, expenses, vendor bills, site progress and AI-powered insights into one system — replacing WhatsApp, spreadsheets and notebooks — so teams know exactly where every rupee goes on every site.

Sitewise tracks material costs and deliveries, mazdoor (labour) wages and advances, vendor and running-account (RA) bills, petty cash, budgets and milestone-based payments across multiple construction sites. The core ledger is free and self-hostable under the O'Saasy License; managed hosting and the AI layer (bill extraction, anomaly detection, cashflow forecasting) are the paid "Pro" tier, free during early access. Open source: Vue 3 + TypeScript + Tailwind + Vite, PocketBase backend.

## Core

- [Sitewise — home](https://sitewise.in/): Product overview, outcomes, how it works, and pricing.
- [Pricing](https://sitewise.in/#pricing): Free self-hosted core vs hosted Pro (with AI), and Enterprise.
- [Open the app](https://app.sitewise.in/login): Sign in or start free on your first site.

## Product & source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/site-wise/app): Source code (O'Saasy License), issues, and releases.
- [User guide](https://github.com/site-wise/app/blob/main/USER_GUIDE.md): How to set up sites and track expenses.
- [Changelog](https://github.com/site-wise/app/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): What's new in each release.
